/usr/bin/ar qc libnetcore_io.a CMakeFiles/netcore_io_obj.dir/src/io/fd_context.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_io_obj.dir/src/io/reactor.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_io_obj.dir/src/io/iomanager.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_io_obj.dir/src/io/hook.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_io_obj.dir/src/io/connect.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libnetcore_io.a
